title: Immersive Redstone Display 3D
description: Redstone wires now show their power with segment displays!
body:
![Redstone wires powered from 0 to 15](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbdd8e06d6e0313576b110db4c12caadb810d7ba.png)
### Better Readability
The power of redstone wires can be easily read from the segment displays.  
0-15 are encoded in base 16 from 0 to F.
